text:
Once upon a time in the little town of Fernhill, there lived a cat named Ginger. Ginger was no ordinary cat. Every evening she would sit quietly by her favorite window watching the stars.

One night, a brilliant meteor glowed softly. Intrigued, Ginger jumped onto a cushion and watched. Suddenly, a voice rang out clear as a bell.

"Hello there."

Startled but curious, Ginger crept closer.

"Abyssowl. I've never heard you."

"You seldom do."

"What's so interesting?"

"Just watched a starship going through our Forestinox."

"Gees! Really?"

"Yes. They say they're friends with a fox."

"A fox?"

"Oh yes. I've seen him. Says lots about everything."

"You know everything?"

"I think so."

"The stars do?"

"Oh yes. And you?"

"Fancy one."

"You've got wings."

"I haven't really ever used them."

"We could fly circles."

"We could. How about you?"

"I couldn't."

"I
